name: ARC On The Road: Skye Canyon - Las Vegas’ premier master-planned community
summary: Tucked between the hustle and bustle of the Las Vegas Strip and the tall timbers of Mt. Charleston, Skye Canyon is being promoted as a community built around outdoor living, wellness and connection. The master-planned community blends modern new-build homes with natural landscapes and highlights access to outdoor activities as a key part of its lifestyle appeal.

name: Women in Hospitality Leadership Conference empowers in Las Vegas
summary: The conference includes the Sip & Savor Grand Tasting on Monday night at UNLV's William F. Harrah College of Hospitality, an immersive event with unlimited food and beverage from Las Vegas' most talented women chefs, mixologists, and winemakers. All proceeds go to the Women in Hospitality initiative, as well as the Rebels EmpowHer and WomenUp programs at UNLV.

name: How to Pick the Right Weight for Your Strength Workouts
summary: Choosing the right weight at the gym can be a challenge. Go too light and you won’t effectively build strength. Go too heavy and your form can break down, increasing the risk of injury and making your workout less effective. To better understand how to choose the right weight for your fitness goals, Health talked to two strength and conditioning specialists. Here’s what they said.

name: UNLV Report Highlights Gaps in AI Use in Gaming
summary: While over 80% of gaming companies use Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) in some form, only one in five companies in the industry have roles in place to govern AI, according to a report released by the International Gaming Institute (IGI) of the University of Nevada, Las Vegas.

name: AI Adoption in Gambling Accelerates as Research Priorities Take Shape
summary: A survey commissioned by the UNLV International Gaming Institute AI Research Hub and KPMG has revealed the rapid adoption of AI in the industry as well as the focus of AI-related publications.

name: New research aims to clarify exercise during pregnancy and postpartum
summary: As an athletic trainer with a sports medicine background, Kara Radzak was curious to know how much she could put her body through after giving birth to her first son in 2018. Radzak, a professor at UNLV’s School of Integrated Health Sciences, browsed PubMed for evidence-based guidelines to support her recovery — to little avail.

name: Suspect arrested in UNLV sexual assault
summary: The University of Nevada, Las Vegas University Police Department partnered with the Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department to locate and arrest the suspect accused of sexually assaulting a UNLV student.

name: UNLV Police: Suspect charged with sexual assault on campus
summary: The assault occurred around 3 a.m. Tuesday at the Legacy Apartments, a student residential complex on the north end of the UNLV campus.

name: UNLV police: Man arrested in on-campus sexual assault held student at knifepoint
summary: In a message to UNLV’s community following the assault, UNLV interim president Chris Heavey said Tuesday he was “deeply troubled” by the incident and that the campus would see heightened police presence in response.
